rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields targeted fixes to the real maintainability issues (the comment-less change at comul_includeRight:170 that duplicates the rfl includeRight_apply, and the two folding-heavy simpa calls at antipode_comp:47), both of which are visible in the diff and improve proof robustness. Review 2's additional demands (refactoring the standard ext+induction+simp at map_id:98 and map_comp:120, or the let-u coercion at 52) address non-material patterns that are idiomatic in the tensor-product style already used elsewhere in the diff, so following it adds churn without commensurate proof-quality gain.
